author: TonyMontana
content:
**Welcome To Module 4: Technical Analysis!**

In this module we will go over all the IMPORTANT things you need to know when it comes to looking at a chart. 

We will focus on candlesticks, support and resistance, top down approach, liquidity and much more.

**Workshop 4 Content:** 👇

Lesson 1 - **Chart Types & Timeframe Analysis**

Lesson 2 - **Anatomy of Candlesticks**

Lesson 3 - **Support & Resistance, Key Levels & Market Trend**

Lesson 4 - **Liquidity**

Lesson 5 - **Chart Patterns**

Lesson 6 - **Indicators**

**Watch Module 4 Here:** 👇
https://whop.com/scarface-trades/the-accelerator-U4q53fe1xXqoEr/app/

@everyone
